summary: TTS | Quick Actions Menu | Navigation to Quick Actions Menu
description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user is in the video player

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates to "Quick Actions Menu" by navigating down once to scrubber
AND the user navigates up once
AND the user reopens the menu item after it closes
steps.result:
THEN the user should see the focus moves to the scrubber
THEN the user should see the focus moves to the Quick Actions Menu
AND the user should hear “Quick Actions Menu”
AND the user should hear again “Quick Actions Menu”
